title: Problem-solving story
subtitle: Use problem, attempt, and final result.
overview: Use problem, attempt, and final result.
Module: Story and Experience. B1 Core develops balanced English: stronger stories, clearer opinions, practical writing, conversation repair, native-style input, and confident spoken output.

sections.title: B1 core focus
rows: A problem-solving story shows your ability to explain steps and outcomes.
解决问题的故事能展示你解释步骤和结果的能力。
Useful frame: background, key moment, result, and what it means now.
实用框架：背景、关键时刻、结果，以及它现在的意义。
讲一个简短的解决问题故事。
The problem was that I could not understand a fast video. First, I tried to listen again. When that did not work, I turned on captions and wrote down key phrases. Finally, I understood the main idea.
问题是我听不懂一个很快的视频。首先，我试着再听一遍。当那不起作用时，我打开字幕并写下关键词组。最后，我理解了主要意思。

items.en: A problem-solving story shows your ability to explain steps and outcomes.
items.zh: 解决问题的故事能展示你解释步骤和结果的能力。

items.en: Useful frame: background, key moment, result, and what it means now.
items.zh: 实用框架：背景、关键时刻、结果，以及它现在的意义。

items.en: The problem was that I could not understand a fast video. First, I tried to listen again. When that did not work, I turned on captions and wrote down key phrases. Finally, I understood the main idea.
items.zh: 问题是我听不懂一个很快的视频。首先，我试着再听一遍。当那不起作用时，我打开字幕并写下关键词组。最后，我理解了主要意思。

items.en: I can say this slowly first, then again with a more natural rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以先慢速说这句，然后再用更自然的节奏说一遍。

items.en: The goal is not a perfect sentence; the goal is a useful sentence I can actually say.
items.zh: 目标不是完美句子；目标是我真的能说出来的有用句子。

items.en: I will keep the main idea clear and add only the details that help.
items.zh: 我会保持主要意思清楚，只加入有帮助的细节。

items.en: If I get stuck, I can repair the sentence and continue.
items.zh: 如果我卡住了，我可以修正句子并继续说。

items.en: This lesson should become part of my spoken English, not just something I understand.
items.zh: 这节课应该变成我口语的一部分，而不只是我理解的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 讲一个简短的解决问题故事。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The problem was that I could not understand a fast video. First, I tried to listen again. When that did not work, I turned on captions and wrote down key phrases. Finally, I understood the main idea.
lines.zh: 问题是我听不懂一个很快的视频。首先，我试着再听一遍。当那不起作用时，我打开字幕并写下关键词组。最后，我理解了主要意思。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say the same idea more simply?
lines.zh: 你能把同一个意思说得更简单吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will keep the key idea, one reason, and one example.
lines.zh: 可以。我会保留核心意思、一个原因和一个例子。

items.zh: 讲一个简短的解决问题故事。

items.en: Make one version about your real life.
items.zh: 做一个关于你真实生活的版本。

items.en: Record it once slowly and once at normal speed.
items.zh: 慢速录一遍，再用正常速度录一遍。

items.en: Listen again and improve one thing: clarity, rhythm, or detail.
items.zh: 再听一遍，并改进一个方面：清晰度、节奏或细节。

items.en: Use the best sentence again tomorrow so it becomes automatic.
items.zh: 明天再次使用最好的句子，让它变得自动化。
